sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Power-Up System
special_mechanics.description: Simplified power-up system where players collect capsules from defeated enemies. Power-ups include Speed-Up, Missiles, Ripple/Plutonic Laser, and Force Field (Shield). Many power-ups can be combined. Options (Multiples) are the only power-up that survives ship destruction.

special_mechanics.name: Cooperative Gameplay
special_mechanics.description: Two-player cooperative mode with Player 1 controlling Vic Viper and Player 2 controlling Lord British spacecraft

special_mechanics.name: Scrolling Stages
special_mechanics.description: Six stages alternating between horizontal and vertical scrolling

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Available sources focus on game design, regional differences, graphics, and gameplay mechanics rather than precise physics parameters. No movement speed, gravity, jump physics, or sub-pixel system data is documented in provided sources.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Life Force NES article)
